# Greybridge Partners — Brand Guide (v0.1)

## Palette
- Charcoal: #1F2937
- Off-white: #F7F5F0
- Muted gold: #B89B5E
- Slate: #64748B

## Voice
- Calm, analytical, direct.
- Prefer short sentences and quantified claims.

## Slide style
- Charcoal header bar, gold accent line
- Simple diagrams; minimal stock photos
